seoTitle: Diamond Beach vs Diamond Head — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Diamond Beach and Diamond Head. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Diamond Beach vs Diamond Head: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Diamond Beach and Diamond Head.
heading: Diamond Beach vs Diamond Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Diamond Beach, New South Wales and Diamond Head, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Diamond Head has a lower overall climate risk score (45/100) compared to Diamond Beach (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Diamond Beach or Diamond Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Diamond Beach has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Diamond Head scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Diamond Beach scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Diamond Head scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Diamond Beach or Diamond Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Diamond Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
